---
title: "Barriers to investing in cycling: Stakeholder views from England"
description: "Rachel Aldred, Tom Watson, Robin Lovelace, and James Woodcock (2017). Barriers to investing in cycling: Stakeholder views from England. *Transportation Research Part A: Policy and Practice*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.tra.2017.11.003"
date: "2017-11-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "aldred_barriers_2017"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Transportation Research Part A: Policy and Practice"
doi: "10.1016/j.tra.2017.11.003"
publication-url: "http://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S096585641730410X"
authors:
  - "Rachel Aldred"
  - "Tom Watson"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "James Woodcock"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Transportation Research Part A: Policy and Practice
**Year:** 2017

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.tra.2017.11.003) [Publisher Link](http://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S096585641730410X) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Rachel Aldred, Tom Watson, Robin Lovelace, and James Woodcock (2017). Barriers to investing in cycling: Stakeholder views from England. *Transportation Research Part A: Policy and Practice*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.tra.2017.11.003

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{aldred_barriers_2017,
  title = {Barriers to Investing in Cycling: {{Stakeholder}} Views from {{England}}},
  shorttitle = {Barriers to Investing in Cycling},
  author = {Aldred, Rachel and Watson, Tom and Lovelace, Robin and Woodcock, James},
  date = {2017-11},
  journaltitle = {Transportation Research Part A: Policy and Practice},
  issn = {09658564},
  doi = {10.1016/j.tra.2017.11.003},
  url = {http://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S096585641730410X},
  urldate = {2018-03-15},
  langid = {english}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
